headline: CPTPP Creates 45,000 Jobs But Disrupts 12 Domestic Sectors
context: Malaysia CPTPP membership created 45,000 new jobs but caused significant disruption to 12 protected domestic sectors since 2024.

cards.big: CPTPP created 45,000 jobs but disrupted 12 protected sectors
cards.sub: Trade benefits concentrate in electronics while agriculture suffers

cards.big: Electronics exports to CPTPP grew 18% contributing RM28 billion in 2025
cards.sub: Semiconductor and electrical equipment accounted for 78% of new jobs

cards.big: Dairy imports from Australia and NZ rose 45% displacing local producers
cards.sub: Malaysian dairy farms reported 22% revenue decline within 12 months

cards.big: Government procurement opening worth RM8 billion concerns Bumiputera contractors
cards.sub: 5-year transition delays full opening but foreign firms already positioning

cards.big: Trade agreements test whether economic gains and sectoral disruption can be balanced
CPTPP creates 45,000 jobs but disrupts 12 sectors. Trade liberalisation produces winners and losers simultaneously.
